title: Survival Basics
focus: First contact, names, needs, places, prices, and simple repair phrases for real arrival days.

sentences.spanish: Hola, ¿qué tal?
sentences.english: Hi, how are you?

sentences.spanish: Me llamo Daniel y voy a estudiar aquí este semestre.
sentences.english: My name is Daniel, and I am going to study here this semester.

sentences.spanish: Nací en Nueva Zelanda, pero ahora vivo en Madrid.
sentences.english: I was born in New Zealand, but now I live in Madrid.

sentences.spanish: Hablo inglés y estoy aprendiendo español.
sentences.english: I speak English, and I am learning Spanish.

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde está el baño?
sentences.english: Where is the bathroom?

sentences.spanish: ¿Cuánto cuesta esto?
sentences.english: How much does this cost?

sentences.spanish: Necesito agua, por favor.
sentences.english: I need water, please.

sentences.spanish: Quiero un café, por favor.
sentences.english: I would like a coffee, please.

sentences.spanish: No entiendo la palabra. ¿Puede repetirlo más despacio?
sentences.english: I do not understand the word. Could you repeat it more slowly?

sentences.spanish: Tengo hambre y necesito descansar un poco.
sentences.english: I am hungry, and I need to rest a little.

sentences.spanish: Buenos días.
sentences.english: Good morning.

sentences.spanish: Soy estudiante internacional y todavía estoy orientándome.
sentences.english: I am an international student, and I am still getting oriented.

sentences.spanish: Antes vivía en una ciudad más pequeña.
sentences.english: I used to live in a smaller city.

sentences.spanish: Entiendo más de lo que puedo decir todavía.
sentences.english: I understand more than I can say yet.

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde está la estación?
sentences.english: Where is the station?

sentences.spanish: ¿Cuánto cuesta el billete?
sentences.english: How much does the ticket cost?

sentences.spanish: Necesito un taxi, por favor.
sentences.english: I need a taxi, please.

sentences.spanish: Quiero una botella de agua, por favor.
sentences.english: I would like a bottle of water, please.

sentences.spanish: No entiendo la dirección. ¿Puede repetirlo más despacio?
sentences.english: I do not understand the address. Could you repeat it more slowly?

sentences.spanish: Tengo sed y necesito descansar un poco.
sentences.english: I am thirsty, and I need to rest a little.

sentences.spanish: Buenas tardes.
sentences.english: Good afternoon.

sentences.spanish: Vengo de Nueva Zelanda y quiero practicar español cada día.
sentences.english: I come from New Zealand, and I want to practice Spanish every day.

sentences.spanish: Mi familia está lejos, así que llamo a casa con frecuencia.
sentences.english: My family is far away, so I call home often.

sentences.spanish: ¿Puede repetir la última parte más despacio?
sentences.english: Can you repeat the last part more slowly?

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde está la parada de autobús?
sentences.english: Where is the bus stop?

sentences.spanish: ¿Cuánto cuesta la tarjeta mensual?
sentences.english: How much does the monthly pass cost?

sentences.spanish: Necesito ayuda, por favor.
sentences.english: I need help, please.

sentences.spanish: Quiero una mesa para dos, por favor.
sentences.english: I would like a table for two, please.

sentences.spanish: No entiendo la pregunta. ¿Puede repetirlo más despacio?
sentences.english: I do not understand the question. Could you repeat it more slowly?

sentences.spanish: Tengo frío y necesito descansar un poco.
sentences.english: I am cold, and I need to rest a little.

sentences.spanish: Buenas noches.
sentences.english: Good evening.

sentences.spanish: Estoy viviendo cerca del campus por primera vez.
sentences.english: I am living near campus for the first time.

sentences.spanish: Llegué hace poco y todavía descubro el barrio.
sentences.english: I arrived recently, and I am still discovering the neighborhood.

sentences.spanish: No conozco esa palabra, pero puedo buscarla.
sentences.english: I do not know that word, but I can look it up.

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde está la biblioteca?
sentences.english: Where is the library?

sentences.spanish: ¿Cuánto cuesta el menú del día?
sentences.english: How much does the daily menu cost?

sentences.spanish: Necesito una tarjeta SIM, por favor.
sentences.english: I need a SIM card, please.

sentences.spanish: Quiero un menú, por favor.
sentences.english: I would like a menu, please.

sentences.spanish: No entiendo el horario. ¿Puede repetirlo más despacio?
sentences.english: I do not understand the schedule. Could you repeat it more slowly?

sentences.spanish: Tengo calor y necesito descansar un poco.
sentences.english: I am hot, and I need to rest a little.

sentences.spanish: Mucho gusto.
sentences.english: Nice to meet you.

sentences.spanish: Me interesa conocer gente local y entender mejor la ciudad.
sentences.english: I am interested in meeting local people and understanding the city better.

sentences.spanish: Elegí este país porque quería estudiar en español.
sentences.english: I chose this country because I wanted to study in Spanish.

sentences.spanish: Estoy practicando la pronunciación de la erre.
sentences.english: I am practicing the pronunciation of the r sound.

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde está la oficina internacional?
sentences.english: Where is the international office?

sentences.spanish: ¿Cuánto cuesta la habitación?
sentences.english: How much does the room cost?

sentences.spanish: Necesito un recibo, por favor.
sentences.english: I need a receipt, please.

sentences.spanish: Quiero un billete de ida, por favor.
sentences.english: I would like a one-way ticket, please.

sentences.spanish: No entiendo el precio. ¿Puede repetirlo más despacio?
sentences.english: I do not understand the price. Could you repeat it more slowly?

sentences.spanish: Tengo sueño y necesito descansar un poco.
sentences.english: I am sleepy, and I need to rest a little.

sentences.spanish: Encantado de conocerte.
sentences.english: I am pleased to meet you.

sentences.spanish: Mi nivel es básico, pero puedo comunicar lo esencial.
sentences.english: My level is basic, but I can communicate the essentials.

sentences.spanish: También me interesa viajar por América Latina algún día.
sentences.english: I am also interested in traveling through Latin America one day.

sentences.spanish: A veces mezclo idiomas cuando estoy cansado.
sentences.english: Sometimes I mix languages when I am tired.

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde está la farmacia?
sentences.english: Where is the pharmacy?

sentences.spanish: ¿Cuánto cuesta el envío?
sentences.english: How much does shipping cost?

sentences.spanish: Necesito un mapa, por favor.
sentences.english: I need a map, please.

sentences.spanish: Quiero una habitación tranquila, por favor.
sentences.english: I would like a quiet room, please.

sentences.spanish: No entiendo la explicación. ¿Puede repetirlo más despacio?
sentences.english: I do not understand the explanation. Could you repeat it more slowly?

sentences.spanish: Tengo prisa y necesito descansar un poco.
sentences.english: I am in a hurry, and I need to rest a little.

sentences.spanish: Gracias por ayudarme.
sentences.english: Thank you for helping me.

sentences.spanish: Si hablo despacio, es porque estoy buscando las palabras.
sentences.english: If I speak slowly, it is because I am looking for the words.

sentences.spanish: Mi ciudad de origen es tranquila y está cerca del mar.
sentences.english: My hometown is quiet and close to the sea.

sentences.spanish: Me ayuda mucho escuchar frases naturales.
sentences.english: It helps me a lot to hear natural sentences.

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde está el supermercado?
sentences.english: Where is the supermarket?

sentences.spanish: ¿Cuánto cuesta la entrada?
sentences.english: How much does the entrance cost?

sentences.spanish: Necesito la contraseña del wifi, por favor.
sentences.english: I need the wifi password, please.

sentences.spanish: Quiero un mapa de la ciudad, por favor.
sentences.english: I would like a city map, please.

sentences.spanish: No entiendo el mensaje. ¿Puede repetirlo más despacio?
sentences.english: I do not understand the message. Could you repeat it more slowly?

sentences.spanish: Tengo dolor de cabeza y necesito descansar un poco.
sentences.english: I have a headache, and I need to rest a little.

sentences.spanish: Perdón, ¿puedo pasar?
sentences.english: Excuse me, may I pass?

sentences.spanish: Estoy aquí para aprender, estudiar y vivir la cultura.
sentences.english: I am here to learn, study, and live the culture.

sentences.spanish: Estoy comparando costumbres sin juzgarlas demasiado rápido.
sentences.english: I am comparing customs without judging them too quickly.

sentences.spanish: Quiero aprender expresiones que se usan de verdad.
sentences.english: I want to learn expressions that are really used.

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde está la residencia?
sentences.english: Where is the residence hall?

sentences.spanish: ¿Cuánto cuesta la consulta?
sentences.english: How much does the appointment cost?

sentences.spanish: Necesito un cargador, por favor.
sentences.english: I need a charger, please.

sentences.spanish: Quiero un taxi, por favor.
sentences.english: I would like a taxi, please.

sentences.spanish: No entiendo el formulario. ¿Puede repetirlo más despacio?
sentences.english: I do not understand the form. Could you repeat it more slowly?

sentences.spanish: Tengo nervios y necesito descansar un poco.
sentences.english: I am nervous, and I need to rest a little.

sentences.spanish: Hasta luego.
sentences.english: See you later.

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría hacer amigos con quienes hablar en español.
sentences.english: I would like to make friends to speak Spanish with.

sentences.spanish: Cada semana entiendo un poco mejor cómo funciona la vida aquí.
sentences.english: Every week I understand a little better how life works here.

sentences.spanish: Corrígeme si digo algo raro, por favor.
sentences.english: Correct me if I say something strange, please.

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde está la entrada principal?
sentences.english: Where is the main entrance?

sentences.spanish: ¿Cuánto cuesta la matrícula?
sentences.english: How much does tuition cost?

sentences.spanish: Necesito un billete, por favor.
sentences.english: I need a ticket, please.

sentences.spanish: Quiero una bolsa, por favor.
sentences.english: I would like a bag, please.

sentences.spanish: No entiendo la instrucción. ¿Puede repetirlo más despacio?
sentences.english: I do not understand the instruction. Could you repeat it more slowly?

sentences.spanish: Tengo mucho cansancio y necesito descansar un poco.
sentences.english: I am very tired, and I need to rest a little.

sentences.spanish: Que tengas un buen día.
sentences.english: Have a good day.

sentences.spanish: Gracias por tu paciencia mientras practico.
sentences.english: Thank you for your patience while I practice.

sentences.spanish: Me gusta explicar de dónde vengo cuando alguien pregunta.
sentences.english: I like explaining where I come from when someone asks.

sentences.spanish: Poco a poco voy ganando confianza al hablar.
sentences.english: Little by little I am gaining confidence when speaking.

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde está la salida?
sentences.english: Where is the exit?

sentences.spanish: ¿Cuánto cuesta el seguro?
sentences.english: How much does insurance cost?

sentences.spanish: Necesito una cita, por favor.
sentences.english: I need an appointment, please.

sentences.spanish: Quiero una copia, por favor.
sentences.english: I would like a copy, please.

sentences.spanish: No entiendo la respuesta. ¿Puede repetirlo más despacio?
sentences.english: I do not understand the answer. Could you repeat it more slowly?

sentences.spanish: Tengo un problema y necesito descansar un poco.
sentences.english: I have a problem, and I need to rest a little.
